vanilla-raspberry-trifle.name: Vanilla Raspberry Trifle
instructions: Line the bottom of a deep glass dish with 1/2 the ladyfingers. Pour 1/2 the rum over ladyfingers; top with 1/2 the raspberries.

Beat cold milk, pudding mix, and orange zest together in a bowl using an electric mixer until smooth, about 2 minutes. Spoon 1/2 the pudding over raspberry layer. Arrange the remaining lady fingers atop pudding layer and around sides of bowl. Pour remaining rum over ladyfingers; top with remaining raspberries and pudding. Refrigerate trifle for flavors to set, about 1 hour.
Beat heavy cream in a bowl using an electric mixer on medium-low speed until fluffy. Spoon whipped cream over trifle and sprinkle with almonds.

vasilopita-politiki-argiro.name: Vasilopita Politiki
instructions: Shake the flour with the baking powder.
Beat the butter and sugar with a hand mixer until they become cream.
Add the eggs one at a time, so the mixture absorbs them before adding the next.
Add the vanillas, mastic, zest and cognac.
Finally drop the almond powder.
Add some flour alternately to the milk.
Butter well and spread non-stick paper (to easily dissipate) on a 30 cm baking pan.
Empty the mixture.
Put the flush on the royal pie.
Bake in a well rehearsed evening at 170°C in the under grill residence for about 1 hour and 10 minutes.
After baking, sprinkle the civil basil pie with powder sugar or decorate it.

veal-croquettes-teleculinaria.name: Veal Croquettes

ingredients.item: 300 g  sobras de carne de vaca cozinhada

instructions: After cleaning skin and bones, crush the meat into a chipper. Also pick the parsley, onion and garlic.

Light a pot with olive oil, onion, garlic and blonde and let it shine. Add the masena flour, previously dissolved in milk, as well as meat, parsley, salt and pepper. Stir and correct the seasonings and consistency. If necessary, add a little more hot milk. Take it out of the fire.
Eliminate the laurel leaf from the previous preparation and mold the croquettes with the help of a little flour. Pass them over to the egg shakes and then to the bread grated.
Light a high frying pan with oil and let it warm. Fry the croquettes, remove them with a skimmer and let it run down on absorbent paper. Serve them hot or cold.

vegan-mofongo-en-caldo-as-made-by-jeremi.name: Vegan Mofongo En Caldo As Made By Jeremie Serrano
instructions: Make the caldo de “pollo”: In a large pot, melt the vegan butter over medium-high heat. Add the onion and garlic paste and sauté until fragrant, 2–3 minutes. Add the vegetable stock and bouillon cube and bring to a boil. Once the bouillon cube has dissolved, reduce the heat to low, add the bay leaves, and season with salt and the pepper. Simmer for 15–20 minutes, until the flavors marry.

Meanwhile, make the mojo: Dice the onion and red and green bell pepper. Transfer to a medium container with a lid and add the garlic paste, cilantro, and olive oil and season with salt and pepper. Stir to combine. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.

Make the mofongo: In a large, high-walled pan, heat the oil over medium-high heat until shimmering. Working in batches, add the plantain pieces to the hot oil and fry for 3–4 minutes, until golden brown on all sides. Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate to drain.

Add a few pieces of fried plantain, some vegan butter, and garlic paste, to a mortar. Mash with the pestle until smooth, adding 1 tablespoon at a time of the caldo until the desired consistency is reached. Season to taste with adobo seasoning. Repeat with the remaining plantains.
Use your hands or rubber spatula to shape the mofongo into roughly 1-cup mounds.
Top the mofongo with the mojo and serve immediately with the hot caldo alongside.
Enjoy!

vegan-pineapple-upside-down-cake.name: Vegan Pineapple Upside-down Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Drain pineapple juice from the can into a 1-cup liquid measure and add enough water to make 1 cup; set aside. Dump pineapple chunks into the bottom of a 12-inch springform pan and sprinkle brown sugar over top.
Combine pineapple juice mixture with oil, vanilla, and vinegar in a bowl.

Mix flour, sugar, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt together in a large bowl. Mix in wet ingredients, stirring quickly to combine and get out any big lumps. Pour into the the pan on top of the pineapples and brown sugar.
Bake until the top is golden and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, 25 to 35 minutes.

Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan, about 30 minutes. Loosen the sides of the cake from the pan, then remove the side ring. Place a serving plate on top and flip cake over. Remove the pan bottom and serve.

vegan-pizza-recipe-with-cauliflower-base.name: Vegan Pizza Recipe With Cauliflower Base
vegan-pizza-recipe-with-cauliflower-base.original_name: Receta de pizza vegana con base de coliflor

ingredients.item: 1/2 taza de aceitunas negras deshuesadas y cortadas a la mitad
1/2 taza de tomates cherry, cortados por la mitad
1 taza de queso vegano  (de estilo feta)

instructions: It purifies the oven to 220 been 3 been.
He scattering his cauliflower. You can choose a thin pounding to get a more padded texture or a thicker pounding for a more robust texture.
It puts the cauliflower with water and leads to boiling with medium-high heat. Just put her steam till she's tender. Drain into a paddle and press to remove excess water.
In a bowl, mix the cracked cauliflower with tipple flour up to a uniform mass. Expand the dough into an oven and baking plate for 15 minutes or until the edges are golden.
Remove the base from the oven and extend the tomato purée evenly. Add spinach, olives and cherry tomatoes. Sprinkle Vegan cheese.
Once all the ingredients are ready, scuba with olive oil and sprinkle with oregano, basil and salt to taste.
Hornea for 12-15 minutes or until edges are crispy and cheese melts.

vegan-vegetable-soup.name: Vegan Vegetable Soup

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat. Add potatoes, celery, carrots, and onion. Saute until slightly soft, 2 to 3 minutes. Add mushrooms and cook, stirring frequently, until onion is translucent, about 3 minutes more. Add chard and garlic; sprinkle with salt and pepper. Cook until chard is wilted, about 2 minutes. Add water to cover, bay leaves, and more salt to taste. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 35 minutes.
Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil; cook fusilli at a boil until tender yet firm to the bite, about 8 minutes; drain.
Stir tofu, tamari, and bouillon into the soup. Simmer until bouillon is dissolved, about 10 minutes. Add a portion of cooked pasta to each bowl and ladle soup over before serving.

vegetable-and-chicken-curry-very-delicio.name: Vegetable And Chicken Curry, Very Delicious
vegetable-and-chicken-curry-very-delicio.original_name: Curry de vegetales y pollo, muy delicioso
instructions: Let's start our recipe, warming up a frying pan with olive oil.
Later you will add cayenne pepper, garlic, cinnamon, ginger and lemongrass. Mix and let cook for 2 minutes till all odors come out.
Later, you will add green beans, lentils, corn, spinach, mushrooms and lemongrass. Mix and cook for 5 minutes.
After that time, we'll put his chicken and mix. You'll let them cook for 5 minutes.
Now, add the can of coconut cream that will give you juicy. Mix and finish cooking with medium heat for about 7 minutes.
Turn off and rectify with a taste. Let them rest and serve with some lemon and parsley juice, if you wish.
Enjoy!

vegetable-cannelloni-recipe-step-by-step.name: Vegetable Cannelloni Recipe Step By Step
vegetable-cannelloni-recipe-step-by-step.original_name: Receta de canelones de verduras paso a paso

ingredients.item: 150 gr de salsa o pasta de tomate

instructions: Expand the plates or plates of earlier cinelons onto a table.
Pela la cebolla y corta en cubitos. Retira las semillas del pimiento y trocea en cubos.
It also cuts pumpkin and pumpkin into pieces or cubes.
Warm up a frying pan with some olive oil.
Once at temperature, add the vegetables, with salt and pepper to suit.
Mezcla y cocina por 4 minutos.
When the vegetables are soft, pour the pasta or tomato sauce. Mix and cook for 3 more minutes.
It purifies the oven at 200 been 3 been.
When the vegetables are ready, turn off and let them stand.
Fill up earlier cinelon plates and then roll up.
Calienta una olla honda y derrite la mantequilla. Luego, incorpora la harina y mezcla sin dejar de mover hasta que se forme una masa suave.
Swallow the milk, some salt and mix till the bechamel sauce's ready.
Put the cannelones with an arm on a plate, have a bath with the bechamel sauce and purge for 10 minutes.
Una vez listos, retira del horno, deja reposar y sirve.
Enjoy!

vegetable-frittata-traditional-italian-r.name: Vegetable Frittata (traditional Italian Recipe)

ingredients.item: 1 slice of fresh motif (or thyme, oregano or parsley if you have)

instructions: It starts with 1 medium residential onion and 1 small red pic.
Warm up an anti-stick frying pan with an olive oil chorrit and put an onion with medium heat.
When you see how soft it starts, add the pepper and cook a few more minutes till it's tender.
Incorporates 80 g of peas (if frozen, do not have to defrost them earlier) and skip them a few minutes to integrate well with the vegetables.
Break 6 eggs into a bowl.
Bate los 6 huevos con una pizca de sal, un poco de pimienta negra y 30 g de queso parmesano rallado.

Add the minced fresh motif (or weed you are using) and mix just right so that everything remains spread. When the frying's ready, put it into the bowl with the eggs and remove to distribute the vegetables throughout the mixture.
Put the frying pan back onto the fire with a teaspoon of olive oil and pour all the mixture.
A little lower the intensity to slow down and let it cook till the edges are firm.
With the help of a plate, turn around - as you would with the Spanish omelette - and cook the other side for a few more minutes, just till it gets some light.
En cuanto la veas cuajada a tu gusto, la retiras del fuego y la sirves.

vegetable-risotto-argiro.name: Vegetable Risotto

ingredients.item: 6 1⁄2 cup of vegetarian or Chicken Juice
Finely chopped small beans (fresh or frozen)
6 1⁄2 cup of vegetarian or Chicken Juice
Finely chopped small beans (fresh or frozen)

instructions: Finely chop all vegetables into small frames first.
Simmer the broth over low heat to keep warm.
Heat the olive oil in a deep pan over medium heat.
Add the onion finely chopped, leek finely chopped and garlic broken.
Sauté for 5 to 6 minutes to make the vegetarians transparent.
Add the zucchini, carrot, pepper and set them aside for 2 to 3 minutes.
Add the rice and mix for 2 minutes.
Pour the wine and let the liquid evaporate completely.
Add 1 cup of hot broth at a time.
Every time he absorbs his fluids, we fill in broth. We mix regularly.
After 10 minutes of cooking, add the beans and peas.
Continue cooking for about 25 minutes in total from the time we start.
Add salt and pepper.
In the end, withdraw from the fire and add the butter and grated parmesan out of the fire and mix to simmer well.
Sprinkle the vegetable risotto with chopped parsley or dill.

very-recipe-for-fluffy-blinis-comedera.name: Very Recipe For Fluffy Blinis

ingredients.item: Una medida de harina (equivalente al pote de yogurt)

instructions: To start with, place yogurt and egg content in a bowl. Filling an empty yogurt pot with wheat flour and pour it into the bowl with other ingredients.
Add a salt and a pepper track to the bowl. Avoid this step if you wish to serve with a sweet preparation.
It well mixes the contents of the bowl up to a homogenous and smooth production. If during the mixture they form clumps, put them with a fork against the ball wall and continue to mix.

Once the blini mix's ready, you'll need no rest. Just get an anti-stick frying pan and warm it with a tablespoon of butter. We have to wait till the butter melts. To avoid turning brown, hold fire at medium intensity. If you don't have butter, use a vegetable oil chorrit.

Be sure that the bottom of the frying pan is well covered with fat, before you start making the blines. To this step, you will need to have some of the mix with a big spoon and put it at the bottom of the frying pan and form a circle as if you did an American pancake. Don't worry if the form doesn't suit you at first. It takes some practice.

Put several blines to cook at once but always leave space with them. You'll see how the dough's solidifying with the heat. When they start to form little holes in it, you'll know that the time has come to turn the blini. Help yourself with a wooden spatula and start with a delicately clear light from the frying pan surface.
Fold the blini to cook from the other side and wait a minute more.
Then get the blini out of the frying pan and leave it in a plate or bowl.
Repeat procedure till blend for blini up there. If necessary, add more fat to frying pan, to ensure that the blines are cooked well and do not stick.
That's all. Take with them with the ingredients of your choice. You can serve them hot or cold.
